headline: McCormick: This Dividend Aristocrat Is Finally Interesting Again (Upgrade)
summary: McCormick (MKC) upgraded to Buy: strong Q1 double-beat, M&A-driven growth, and $600M synergies. Read the full analysis here.

headline: McCormick: Unilever Synergies Create A Great Long-Term Story
summary: McCormick is rated Buy due to resilient brands, margin expansion, and a compelling dividend yield at depressed valuations. Read more on MKC stock here.
